system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Any Melee
Type: Stance (Formation)
Qi: 1

This is a combined sword stance that must be used by two practitioners, with one standing atop the other’s palm and being raised high in the air, to create a towering effect against opponents. It extends their reach against opponents but also can provide a strong barrier against Qi Attacks. Using this stance, the practitioners improve their reach by one category (must be using a sword). However they must move together and can only do so at half their normal rate. Cathartic: Used Cathartically this increases your Parry and Hardiness to 10 against any Neigong based Attack.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: Must be used by two practitioners, with one standing atop the other’s palm and being raised high in the air, to create a towering effect against opponents.
system.catharticEffect: Used Cathartically this increases your Parry and Hardiness to 10 against any Neigong based Attack.
system.formationNotes: Requires at least 2 participants. Formation can be broken by a Total Success attack against it.
